reason: This finding configures pam_faillock to persist lockouts across reboots by setting a tally directory. The remediation uses authselect, which is the recommended tool for PAM configuration on modern RHEL systems. The script includes integrity checks and applies changes safely. This follows standard STIG hardening patterns for authentication and does not pose a risk of lockout or system breakage when authselect is used properly.
estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; Authentication hardening; Account lockout persistence
